title: Mokani Bath Sealant Strip, 2 Rolls Bathroom Sealant Tape, Self Adhesive Caulk Strip, Waterproof Sealing Tape for Kitchen, Sink, Bathtub, Toilet, Shower, Wall Corner with Sealing Tool, White (11FT)
features: 【Size】Bath sealant strip each roll Width: 38mm/1.5 inch, Length: 3.2m/126 inch.
【Material】: Made of high-quality PVC material, the bath sealant strip is waterproof, oil-proof and has long-lasting seal and adhesion.

【Linear design】: Sealing tape with crease design can be folded to 90 degrees to tightly seal the gap between the walls. Note: If it is used in a low temperature place, it can be heated with a hair dryer and used after the tape softens.
【Easy Installation】: Peel and press the self-adhesive strip to the surface in minutes. Then use a sealing tool to press and smooth it. No mess and waste, a great alternative to regular caulk.

【Wide Application】: White sealant tape can be used to seal the joints of bathtub, shower, sink, toilet, washbasin, gas stoves and walls, It could prevent them from getting black and keep your kitchen and bathroom clean and tidy.
description: Product Description Product Features Self adhesive Self adhesive back glue design with good sealing, when removed, the caulk tape leaves no trace or residue behind. Waterproof and oil-proof Adds a barrier to water infiltration. Smooth surface, reduce stains attached, easy to clean. Sealed and beautiful Keep your house clean and tidy as new one for a long time. Specially designed for family. Free Cutting The material is soft and easy to cut. Cut freely to meet your needs. Wide Application Previous page Next page What should be careful before use? To ensure that surface is clean and dry. Where can caulk tape be used? It can use for Kitchen Countertop, Sink, Bathroom, Toilet, Bathtubs, Floor Wall Edge Protector ect. What are the advantages of our caulk tape? It has stronger adhesive more than others.
